conversation_text:
We need a website for our cafe where customers can see today's menu and opening hours.
Customers should be able to reserve tables online for specific time slots.
Staff must be able to update menu items and prices from an admin page.
Most visitors will use phones, so the site should load quickly on mobile.
The design should feel clean and modern.
We may add online payment later.

conversation_units.text: We need a website for our cafe where customers can see today's menu and opening hours.
Customers should be able to reserve tables online for specific time slots.
Staff must be able to update menu items and prices from an admin page.
Most visitors will use phones, so the site should load quickly on mobile.
The design should feel clean and modern.
We may add online payment later.

gold.project_summary: The project is a cafe website with customer-facing pages and a staff admin feature. It also includes mobile performance expectations and unresolved design/payment scope decisions.

functional_requirements.text: The system shall provide a website where customers can view menu items and opening hours.
The system shall allow customers to reserve tables for specific time slots.
The system shall provide an admin page where staff can update menu items and prices.

non_functional_requirements.text: The system should provide a mobile-compatible responsive interface with fast page loading.

open_questions.text: What concrete visual criteria define the requested clean and modern style?
Should online payment be included in the current release or postponed?

follow_up_questions.text: Could you share reference websites that represent the desired clean and modern style?
Which payment providers should be supported if online payment is in scope?

notes.text: Online payment is currently a future-phase item.

conversation_text:
Our student club needs a scheduling app for weekly events and workshops.
Members should be able to RSVP and receive reminder notifications before each event.
Officers need an admin panel to create events and manage attendance.
The app should be easy to use because many members are first-year students.
It should work smoothly on both Android and iPhone devices.
We might add a payment feature for paid workshops in a future semester.

conversation_units.text: Our student club needs a scheduling app for weekly events and workshops.
Members should be able to RSVP and receive reminder notifications before each event.
Officers need an admin panel to create events and manage attendance.
The app should be easy to use because many members are first-year students.
It should work smoothly on both Android and iPhone devices.
We might add a payment feature for paid workshops in a future semester.

gold.project_summary: The project is a club event scheduling app with RSVP, reminders, and officer administration. Usability and cross-platform mobile support are important, while payment remains future scope.

functional_requirements.text: The system shall provide scheduling for recurring club events and workshops.
The system shall allow members to RSVP and receive event reminder notifications.
The system shall provide an admin panel for officers to create events and manage attendance.

non_functional_requirements.text: The system should provide a simple and beginner-friendly user experience.
The system should support both Android and iOS devices reliably.

open_questions.text: How should usability be measured for first-year students?
Is paid workshop payment in scope for the first release?

follow_up_questions.text: What user flow should be considered the primary path for first-year students?
If payment is included later, which payment methods should be supported?

notes.text: Paid workshop payment is future scope.

constraints.text: Paid workshop payment shall be excluded from the initial release scope.

conversation_text:
We need an online booking system for our dental clinic.
Patients should be able to choose a dentist and a time slot.
Reception staff need to approve or reschedule requests from an admin dashboard.
The system must be secure because it includes personal information.
It should feel simple for older patients.
Maybe we will add online payment in phase two.

conversation_units.text: We need an online booking system for our dental clinic.
Patients should be able to choose a dentist and a time slot.
Reception staff need to approve or reschedule requests from an admin dashboard.
The system must be secure because it includes personal information.
It should feel simple for older patients.
Maybe we will add online payment in phase two.

gold.project_summary: The project is a clinic booking platform for patients and reception staff. Security is mandatory, while usability details and payment timeline require clarification.

functional_requirements.text: The system shall provide online appointment booking for the dental clinic.
The system shall allow patients to select a dentist and available time slot.
The system shall provide an admin dashboard for staff to approve or reschedule bookings.

non_functional_requirements.text: The system shall protect personal information with strong security controls.

open_questions.text: What specific usability criteria define simple for older patients?
Should online payment be deferred to phase two?

follow_up_questions.text: Do you have accessibility requirements such as larger text and reduced interaction steps?
Which compliance and payment provider requirements apply if payment is added later?

notes.text: Online payment is identified as phase-two scope.

constraints.text: Online payment shall not be included before phase two.

conversation_text:
We run a gym and need a class booking app.
Users must be able to browse classes, book seats, and cancel bookings.
Trainers should see participant lists and mark attendance.
The app should load fast during evening rush hours.
The interface should look modern.
We may introduce membership billing later.

conversation_units.text: We run a gym and need a class booking app.
Users must be able to browse classes, book seats, and cancel bookings.
Trainers should see participant lists and mark attendance.
The app should load fast during evening rush hours.
The interface should look modern.
We may introduce membership billing later.

gold.project_summary: The project is a gym class booking app with member booking workflows and trainer operations. Performance is critical during peak traffic and visual style and billing scope are not fully defined.

functional_requirements.text: The system shall provide class browsing, seat booking, and booking cancellation.
The system shall allow trainers to view participant lists and record attendance.

non_functional_requirements.text: The system should maintain fast response time during evening peak usage.

open_questions.text: What visual references define the modern interface expectation?
Should membership billing be part of the current release?

follow_up_questions.text: Can you provide benchmark response-time targets for peak traffic?
Which billing scenarios must be supported if membership billing is included?

notes.text: Membership billing is currently future scope.

constraints.text: Membership billing shall not be included in the first release.

conversation_text:
Our university library needs a room reservation tool.
Students should be able to find rooms by time and capacity.
Staff should be able to block rooms for maintenance.
Most users will access it from phones.
It should be very easy to use.
We might add ID card integration in a later phase.

conversation_units.text: Our university library needs a room reservation tool.
Students should be able to find rooms by time and capacity.
Staff should be able to block rooms for maintenance.
Most users will access it from phones.
It should be very easy to use.
We might add ID card integration in a later phase.

gold.project_summary: The project is a library room reservation tool with student search and staff management functions. Mobile-first usage is expected, while usability detail and ID integration scope remain open.

functional_requirements.text: The system shall provide room search by time and capacity.
The system shall allow staff to block rooms for maintenance periods.

non_functional_requirements.text: The system should provide a mobile-compatible interface optimized for phone usage.

open_questions.text: Which usability metrics should define very easy to use?
Should ID card integration be included in the first release?

follow_up_questions.text: Do you require one-handed mobile navigation for the main booking flow?
What external systems are required for future ID card integration?

notes.text: ID card integration is a future-phase item.

constraints.text: ID card integration shall be treated as a later-phase feature, not initial scope.

conversation_text:
We need a platform where students can book tutoring sessions.
Tutors should set available slots and students should request a slot.
The system should send confirmation and reminder emails.
It must be reliable around exam periods.
The UI should feel simple.
Maybe group-session support will be added later.

conversation_units.text: We need a platform where students can book tutoring sessions.
Tutors should set available slots and students should request a slot.
The system should send confirmation and reminder emails.
It must be reliable around exam periods.
The UI should feel simple.
Maybe group-session support will be added later.

gold.project_summary: The project is a tutoring booking platform with slot management and email notifications. Reliability during peak exam demand is required, while UI standards and group-session scope need clarification.

functional_requirements.text: The system shall allow students to book tutoring sessions.
The system shall allow tutors to publish available slots and students to request them.
The system shall send booking confirmation and reminder emails.

non_functional_requirements.text: The system should remain reliable during exam-period peak traffic.

open_questions.text: What usability criteria define a simple user interface?
Should group-session support be included in the first release?

follow_up_questions.text: Do you have uptime or error-rate targets for exam periods?
How should group sessions differ from one-on-one sessions if added later?

notes.text: Group-session support is currently future scope.

constraints.text: Group-session support shall be excluded from the initial release.
